title: AgentCapabilitySignals
description: Programmatic-access signals for a single registrar. Signals only — Open Domain Data does not score or rank registrars based on these fields.

scoped_tokens.description: Per-scope / least-privilege API tokens are supported.

dns_api.description: DNS records are editable through the API.

human_approval_flow.description: A built-in human-approval step before write actions exists.

openapi_spec.description: A public OpenAPI / Swagger document exists.

mcp_interface.description: An official Model Context Protocol server for domain operations is published.

field_provenance.description: Per-field provenance. Maps a field name in this record to the source URL it was checked against, its verification status and the timestamp of that check. Field-level entries are authoritative over the record-level verification_status/last_checked for the field they describe.

source_url.description: Primary source URL the field value was checked against.

note.description: Human-readable note describing how this specific field was checked.
